findings.title: High cognitive complexity in calculate_pricing()
findings.description: Function 'calculate_pricing' in src\myapp\processors\pricing.py has cognitive complexity 52 (threshold: 15). Complex control flow makes this function hard to understand and maintain.
findings.fix: Reduce cognitive complexity of 'calculate_pricing' (currently 52, threshold 15): extract nested logic into helper functions, replace nested conditionals with guard clauses, simplify boolean expressions.
